prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-GALAXYSRD-GRN-KT818-5 Product Type: TOYS_AND_GAMES Brand (from catalog): Kidplokio Existing Title: Kidplokio Green Galaxy Space Sword Interactive Toy Lights Sounds Boys 3 and Up Description: Calling all little space rangers report to duty, your next intergalactic space battle awaits.

Suit up with this futuristic space sword toy that comes with awesome LED lights and captivating sounds, making playtime even more fun and realistic for kids. They'll be kept busy for hours conjuring up space rescue missions and alien battle scenarios with this futuristic space sword toy by their side. This Galaxy Space Sword toy from Kidplokio has an array of blasting sounds and out-of-this-world light effects; featuring bright LED Lights that illuminate in vibrant colors when the grip trigger is engaged, playtime just skyrocketed to the next level. Lightweight and easy to hold, kids won't have any problem wielding their new favorite sword.

And, not only will your little space ranger be thrilled and occupied for hours with this Galaxy Sword Toy with lights and sounds, kids will be engaging in significant early educational growth, like working fine and gross motor skills, as well as improving cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions.

This toy is made of durable, nontoxic plastic that is ready to take on space aliens indoors and out; the intergalactic space-themed toy sword is ready for action with batteries included and no assembly required. The futuristic Space Battle Sword Toy is ideal for endless imaginative opportunities, whether it's battling intergalactic space aliens or a sibling or parent, your Galactic Guardian will be at the ready. Search Terms: Toys for boys birthday present stocking stuffers brother Hanukkah Christmas gifts holiday toys list 2022 interactive space toys playroom essentials cosplay galaxy roleplay games ninja foam sword for kids kids ninja sword larping space toys Features: - GALAXY TOY SWORD: Little space rangers report to duty, your next intergalactic space battle awaits! Suit up with this futuristic space sword toy that comes with awesome LED lights and captivating sounds, making playtime even more fun and realistic for kids! - AWESOME LIGHTS AND SOUNDS: Featuring stunning LED Lights that illuminate in vibrant colors when the grip trigger is engaged, this Galaxy Space Sword toy has an array of sounds and colorful light effects; this toy sword is ready for action with batteries included and no assembly required - PRETEND PLAY SPACE TOYS: Hours of intergalactic pretend play awaits! Little ones will be kept busy for hours conjuring up space rescue missions and alien battle scenarios with their futuristic space sword by their side; Lightweight and easy to hold, kids won't have any problem wielding their new favorite sword - CHILD DEVELOPMENT: Not only will your little space ranger be thrilled and occupied for hours with this Galaxy Sword Toy with lights and sounds, but kids will also be engaging in significant early educational growth, like working fine and gross motor skills, as well as improving cognitive development through imaginative playtime sessions - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 20 x 7.5 x 2 inches; Weight: 0.95lbs; Colors: Green or Red; Batteries: Included; Assembly: Not Required; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
